title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Embassy Office Parks REIT

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Embassy Office Parks REIT
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Embassy Office Parks REIT in Delhi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Embassy Office Parks REIT:
Embassy Office Parks REIT is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Embassy Office Parks REIT!
